summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of 'Weekly Orientation Summary' feature completed. All 16 tests PASSED. Feature creates a weekly reset and intention-setting loop showing last week's dominant pattern, strongest movements, and this week's recommended direction. Clearing localStorage 'philos_weekly_orientation' triggers orientation section to appear at top of Home tab before daily orientation. Section shows correct Hebrew content with RTL layout. Start Week button (התחל את השבוע) is clickable, section disappears after clicking, localStorage saves metadata correctly (weekId, timestamp, week_started, weekly_orientation_direction, weekly_pattern_reference, last_week_decisions, recommendation_reason), and orientation doesn't reappear after page reload.
critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: Component uses data-testid attributes (weekly-orientation-summary-section, last-week-pattern, weekly-recommendation, start-week-btn)
GOOD: RTL layout with dir='rtl' on section element
GOOD: LocalStorage persistence using 'philos_weekly_orientation' key with proper metadata structure
GOOD: New week detection via getWeekId() function comparing year-week format (e.g., 2026-W11)
GOOD: Last week pattern analysis (analyzeLastWeekPatterns) processes history for previous week decisions
GOOD: Recommended direction based on last week's pattern (harm → recovery, avoidance → order, etc.)
GOOD: Direction colors properly applied with directionColors object (green for contribution, blue for recovery, etc.)
GOOD: Clean visual design with purple gradient background and proper spacing
GOOD: Weekly appears before daily orientation in component hierarchy
seed_data_creation: None required - localStorage manipulation simulates new week
context_for_next_testing_agent: Weekly Orientation Summary feature is fully functional. To trigger orientation: localStorage.removeItem('philos_weekly_orientation'); then reload page. Section appears at top of Home tab before daily orientation. After clicking 'התחל את השבוע', section disappears and localStorage stores: {weekId, timestamp, week_started, weekly_orientation_direction, weekly_pattern_reference, last_week_decisions, recommendation_reason}. Key data-testids: weekly-orientation-summary-section, last-week-pattern, weekly-recommendation, start-week-btn.

feature_tests.test: WeeklyOrientationSummarySection appears when localStorage philos_weekly_orientation is cleared
Section shows subheader 'השבוע החדש מתחיל מתוך הדפוס של השבוע שעבר.'
Last week pattern shows 'לא הייתה פעילות בשבוע שעבר.' when no previous activity
This week recommendation section shows 'השבוע' header
Weekly recommendation shows insight text with 'מומלץ' or 'כיוון'
Start Week button (התחל את השבוע) exists and visible
Start Week button has correct text
After clicking Start Week, section disappears
Daily orientation visible after weekly orientation dismissed
localStorage saves metadata correctly (weekId, timestamp, week_started, direction)
Weekly orientation doesn't reappear on page reload
RTL Hebrew layout maintained with dir='rtl'

weekly_orientation_summary.subheader: השבוע החדש מתחיל מתוך הדפוס של השבוע שעבר.

last_week_section.label: שבוע שעבר
last_week_section.with_activity: בלט דפוס של [pattern description]. + strongest positive/negative

this_week_section.label: השבוע
this_week_section.recommendation_insight: Dynamic based on last week pattern

start_week_button.action: Saves to localStorage and hides section
